<features>
- observable feature: pattern of hexagonal shapes
- observable feature: dark coloration
- observable feature: metallic sheen
</features>
<kb>
- IF [pattern of hexagonal shapes AND dark coloration AND metallic sheen] THEN [18]
- IF [pattern of vertical stripes] THEN [22]
- IF [veined, marbled pattern with white and dark tones] THEN [23]
- IF [pattern of uniform circular holes] THEN [27]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the Query Image shows a pattern of hexagonal shapes, is dark in coloration, and has a metallic sheen, matching the features described in the IF condition for class 18.
</rule_check>
<response>18</response>
